flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Caddo Kiowa Technology Center fell 56% between 2006 and 2009 (417 → 183).

flags.label: Earnings trend · post-entry horizons
flags.summary: Earnings 10 years post-entry at Caddo Kiowa Technology Center are 23% below 6-year earnings ($28.0k → $21.6k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 10 pp at Caddo Kiowa Technology Center vs the 2003–2007 baseline (62.5% vs 72.3%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Caddo Kiowa Technology Center rose 29% between 2021 and 2024 (70.6% → 90.9%).
